assertions.reason: The live approval-events widget flow passed after emitting an approvalRequested event for thread-123, and the UI showed the linked pending approval inside the originating thread before the same request appeared in the approvals queue.

The approval-detail widget flows passed while showing the exact action under review, the approval reason, workspace, repository, current branch, remote, command/file context, and, for branch-switch approvals, the exact target branch release/hotfix-42.

The full-control approval widget flow passed after tapping Approve, and the approval detail updated to approved / already resolved as approved, which is the user-surface signal that the pending request was resolved and the blocked action resumed.

I could not conclude the reject-path assertion honestly from user-surface evidence because the available flutter-mobile-widget-tests harness did not include a targeted full-control reject flow; a direct targeted invocation reported that no tests matched the expected reject case.

The resolved-approval sync widget flow passed after approving from the queue and reopening the originating thread, where the thread context panel showed the linked approval as Approved instead of leaving stale pending state behind.

The lower-permission widget flow passed in control-with-approvals mode with both approve and reject buttons disabled and a user-facing message that approval actions are available only in full-control mode.

The stale-approval widget flow passed when a late approve attempt surfaced Approval is no longer actionable, refreshed the record, and marked the approval as already resolved as approved, making it non-actionable from the mobile UI.

frictions: The flutter-mobile-widget-tests surface provides assertion-backed Flutter command logs rather than standalone screenshots, videos, policy logs, or API/websocket captures, so this report relies on saved widget-test logs for user-surface evidence.

The available approvals widget harness covered detail context, approve, lower-permission disablement, stale/non-actionable handling, live refresh, and resolution sync, but not a dedicated full-control reject flow.

blockers.description: No targeted flutter-mobile-widget-tests case exercised rejecting a pending approval in full-control mode.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran a direct flutter test --plain-name "full-control mode can reject pending approvals" probe against approvals_queue_page_test.dart and received No tests match that name.
